Title: Cold Case
Actors: Kathryn Morris, Danny Pino, John Finn
Plot: Lilly Rush is a Philadelphia police detective working for the department's homicide squad and being assigned "cold cases": crimes that were committed many years before and have not been solved. Lilly must try to re-think the crime scenes and interview other people involved with the victims to find a link to solving the cases.
Awards: Nominated for 1 Primetime Emmy. 12 wins & 28 nominations total
